name: Consolidate daily Google Form submissions into one Gmail recap

parameters.content:
## Required


- Google account
- Google Form
- Google Sheet linked to the form

## 1.Workflow trigger et data gathering

The workflow is **triggered automatically** everyday at 5pm. 

How to setup:
- Set up your Google form and link it to a google sheet
- link the google sheet to this workflow

## 2. Send the email

The code node, will create the message and gather all the informations wanted about the row added during the day and will list them (row newly added). So a full sum um will be sent in one message only.


How to setup:
- Connect with your Gmail account credentials.
